article.body_preview:
DHAKA, April 5, 2023 (BSS) - Bangladesh Garment Manufacturers and Exporters Association (BGME) has joined a global alliance urging governments around the world to modernize the domestic fashion labeling requirements and support the use of more sustainable digital labels.

The President of BGMEA Faruque Hassan signed a letter in this regard yesterday (Tuesday).

The letter calls upon the governments to amend national regulations to allow the adoption of fully digital labeling. By signing this let
